## How to test

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes work as described
- [ ] `pnpm test` (or `vitest run`) passes, `tsc` clean
- [ ] The §I invariant still holds — every advisor call fits the target model's window (if you touched the context engine, council fit, or debate fit)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or auth headers in code or error strings
- [ ] Docs match behavior — if you changed what a mode/config does, the README and SPEC.md say the same thing
- [ ] Conventional commit format in the PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`)
